question: Count patients by risk level.
sql: SELECT risk_level, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM patients_core GROUP BY risk_level ORDER BY patient_count DESC
insight: Count patients by risk level. Top segment is stable with 5; review table rows and chart before using this as demo evidence.

question: Which clinicians have the most pending reviews?
sql: SELECT assigned_clinician, COUNT(*) AS pending_reviews FROM patients_core WHERE ai_review_status = 'needs_review' GROUP BY assigned_clinician ORDER BY pending_reviews DESC LIMIT 10
insight: Which clinicians have the most pending reviews? Top segment is Dr. Sarah Miller with 1; review table rows and chart before using this as demo evidence.

layout.title: Which clinicians have the most pending reviews?

question: Show average extraction confidence by imaging modality.
sql: SELECT i.modality, ROUND(AVG(s.extraction_confidence), 3) AS avg_confidence FROM imaging_studies i JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = i.session_id GROUP BY i.modality ORDER BY avg_confidence DESC
insight: Show average extraction confidence by imaging modality. Top segment is MRI with 0.861; review table rows and chart before using this as demo evidence.

layout.title: Show average extraction confidence by imaging modality.

question: Which lab components are most often abnormal?
sql: SELECT component, COUNT(*) AS abnormal_results FROM lab_results WHERE flag != 'normal' GROUP BY component ORDER BY abnormal_results DESC
insight: Which lab components are most often abnormal? Top segment is CRP with 30; review table rows and chart before using this as demo evidence.

layout.title: Which lab components are most often abnormal?

question: Show high-risk extraction sessions by year.
sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', session_date) AS session_year, COUNT(*) AS high_risk_sessions FROM sessions JOIN patients_core USING (patient_id) WHERE risk_level = 'high' GROUP BY session_year ORDER BY session_year
insight: Show high-risk extraction sessions by year. Top segment is 2025 with 2; review table rows and chart before using this as demo evidence.

layout.title: Show high-risk extraction sessions by year.

question: How many agent audit events exist by pipeline?
sql: SELECT agent_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM audit_log GROUP BY agent_name ORDER BY event_count DESC
insight: How many agent audit events exist by pipeline? Top segment is database_intelligence_pipeline with 32; review table rows and chart before using this as demo evidence.

layout.title: How many agent audit events exist by pipeline?

question: Which comorbidity categories are most common among high-risk patients?
sql: SELECT pc.category, COUNT(*) AS condition_count FROM patient_conditions pc JOIN patients_core p USING (patient_id) WHERE p.risk_level = 'high' AND pc.is_primary = 0 GROUP BY pc.category ORDER BY condition_count DESC
insight: Which comorbidity categories are most common among high-risk patients? Top segment is renal with 1; review table rows and chart before using this as demo evidence.

layout.title: Which comorbidity categories are most common among high-risk patients?

question: Compare average BMI and blood pressure by risk level.
sql: SELECT p.risk_level, ROUND(AVG(v.bmi), 1) AS avg_bmi, ROUND(AVG(v.systolic_bp), 1) AS avg_systolic_bp FROM vital_signs v JOIN patients_core p USING (patient_id) GROUP BY p.risk_level ORDER BY avg_systolic_bp DESC
insight: Compare average BMI and blood pressure by risk level. Top segment is needs_review with 32.2; review table rows and chart before using this as demo evidence.

layout.title: Compare average BMI and blood pressure by risk level.

question: Which medication classes have the lowest adherence scores?
sql: SELECT medication_class, ROUND(AVG(adherence_score), 2) AS avg_adherence, COUNT(*) AS medication_count FROM medications WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY medication_class ORDER BY avg_adherence ASC LIMIT 10
insight: Which medication classes have the lowest adherence scores? Top segment is Biguanide with 0.74; review table rows and chart before using this as demo evidence.

layout.title: Which medication classes have the lowest adherence scores?

question: Show open care gaps by priority and owner.
sql: SELECT priority, owner, COUNT(*) AS open_gap_count FROM care_gaps WHERE status IN ('open', 'scheduled', 'deferred') GROUP BY priority, owner ORDER BY open_gap_count DESC LIMIT 12
insight: Show open care gaps by priority and owner. Top segment is medium with Dr. Priya Rao; review table rows and chart before using this as demo evidence.

layout.title: Show open care gaps by priority and owner.

question: How does evidence completeness vary by language?
sql: SELECT preferred_language, ROUND(AVG(data_completeness_score), 2) AS avg_completeness, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM patients_core GROUP BY preferred_language ORDER BY avg_completeness ASC
insight: How does evidence completeness vary by language? Top segment is Hindi with 0.69; review table rows and chart before using this as demo evidence.

layout.title: How does evidence completeness vary by language?
